---
name: Jurisdiction proposal
about: Propose a new Canadian jurisdiction module
title: '[Jurisdiction] '
labels: jurisdiction
assignees: ''
---

## Jurisdiction

Province or territory name and two-letter abbreviation (e.g., Quebec / QC).

## FOI Legislation

The full citation of the primary FOI statute. Example: "Freedom of Information and Protection of Privacy Act, RSBC 1996, c 165 (FIPPA)"

Provide the URL to the current consolidated statute on the provincial Queen's Printer or legislative assembly website.

## Key Sections

| Section | Description |
|---|---|
| Right of access | s. |
| Duty to assist | s. |
| Time limit | s. (X calendar/business days) |
| Fee waiver | s. |
| Review / appeal | s. |

## Oversight Body

Name and URL of the provincial Information and Privacy Commissioner or equivalent oversight body.

## Public Bodies

How many public bodies are subject to the legislation? (Order of magnitude is fine: dozens, hundreds, thousands)

Do you have access to a directory or registry of FOI coordinators? (Link if yes)

## Assessment Framework

What legislation governs environmental assessment in this jurisdiction?

## Your qualifications

What gives you confidence in the accuracy of the above? For example:
- "I am a paralegal who has filed FOI requests in this province"
- "I am a law student who researched this for a course"
- "I have no formal qualifications but I cross-referenced the sections against the statute myself"

Honesty here is important. An unverified module that discloses its status is more useful than a verified module that isn't.

## Willingness to maintain

Jurisdiction modules need to be updated when legislation changes. Are you willing to be notified of legislative changes and update the module if needed?

- [ ] Yes, I will maintain this module
- [ ] I can contribute it but cannot commit to ongoing maintenance
- [ ] I am proposing this for someone else to build

## Additional context

Anything else relevant. Known gaps, known issues with the legislation, advocacy groups working in this jurisdiction.
